meta.dc:title: 119 HCONRES 109 ENR: Concurrent Resolution
meta.dc:creator: United States House of Representatives
meta.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

preface.congress: One Hundred Nineteenth Congress of the United States of America
preface.session: A T T H E S E C O N D S E S S I O N
preface.enrolledDateline: Begun and held at the City of Washington on Saturday, the third day of January, two thousand and twenty-six

resolvingClause.i: Resolved by the House of Representatives (the Senate concurring),

section.heading: use of emancipation hall for a ceremony to dedicate the semiquincentennial time capsule in honor of america’s 250th anniversary

subsection.heading: Authorization.—
subsection.content: Emancipation Hall in the Capitol Visitor Center is authorized to be used on June 24, 2026, for a ceremony to dedicate the Semiquincentennial Congressional Time Capsule in honor of the 250th Anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence.

subsection.heading: Preparations.—
subsection.content: Physical preparations for the ceremony described in subsection (a) shall be carried out in accordance with such conditions as the Architect of the Capitol may prescribe.

signature.role: Clerk of the House of Representatives.
